candidate.completion: bring a plus-one so I can feel rejected in stereo.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please bring a plus-one so I can feel rejected in stereo.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and logically sound: loneliness becomes a request to multiply the feeling by adding a witness. "Rejected in stereo" gives the line a memorable snap, but it also feels slightly familiar and a bit pushed, which keeps the originality and elegance below the top tier.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
